--- Rząd k = 1 ---
y_n + h*f(n)

--- Rząd k = 2 ---
y_n - h*(f(n - 1)/2 - (3*f(n))/2)

--- Rząd k = 3 ---
y_n + (23*h*f(n))/12 - (4*h*f(n - 1))/3 + (5*h*f(n - 2))/12

--- Rząd k = 4 ---
y_n + (55*h*f(n))/24 - (59*h*f(n - 1))/24 + (37*h*f(n - 2))/24 - (3*h*f(n - 3))/8

--- Rząd k = 5 ---
y_n + (1901*h*f(n))/720 - (1387*h*f(n - 1))/360 + (109*h*f(n - 2))/30 - (637*h*f(n - 3))/360 + (251*h*f(n - 4))/720

--- Rząd k = 6 ---
y_n + (4277*h*f(n))/1440 - (2641*h*f(n - 1))/480 + (4991*h*f(n - 2))/720 - (3649*h*f(n - 3))/720 + (959*h*f(n - 4))/480 - (95*h*f(n - 5))/288

--- Rząd k = 7 ---
y_n + (198721*h*f(n))/60480 - (18637*h*f(n - 1))/2520 + (235183*h*f(n - 2))/20160 - (10754*h*f(n - 3))/945 + (135713*h*f(n - 4))/20160 - (5603*h*f(n - 5))/2520 + (19087*h*f(n - 6))/60480

--- Rząd k = 8 ---
y_n + (16083*h*f(n))/4480 - (1152169*h*f(n - 1))/120960 + (242653*h*f(n - 2))/13440 - (296053*h*f(n - 3))/13440 + (2102243*h*f(n - 4))/120960 - (115747*h*f(n - 5))/13440 + (32863*h*f(n - 6))/13440 - (5257*h*f(n - 7))/17280

--- Rząd k = 9 ---

--- Rząd k = 10 ---

--- Rząd k = 13 ---

--- Rząd k = 15 ---

--- Rząd k = 18 ---

--- Rząd k = 19 ---

--- Rząd k = 20 ---
